articles.title: Elon Musk vs. Sam Altman: The $852 Billion Fight Over a Robot Brain
articles.summary: Elon Musk says Sam Altman broke a promise to keep OpenAI a charity. Now they're in court fighting over the company that made ChatGPT, which is worth $852 billion. Musk wants Altman kicked off the board.

articles.title: Supreme Court Might Let the Government Send Over a Million People Away
articles.summary: The Supreme Court seems ready to let the Trump administration end a program called TPS. That program lets people from countries like Haiti and Syria live and work in the U.S. legally because it's not safe back home. Over a million people could be forced to leave.

articles.title: Canada's Prime Minister Stands Up to Trump—and It's Working
articles.summary: Canada's Prime Minister Mark Carney has been dealing with President Trump's threats for a year. Instead of giving in, he's making new friends around the world. His approval rating is up to 58%, and experts say he's been 'strong and resolute.'
